trans-unit.source: Something went wrong. Please try again.
No connection to the server. Check your network and try again.
The request could not be processed.
You are not authorized. Please sign in again.
You do not have permission to perform this action.
The requested resource was not found.
This action conflicts with the current state of the data.
Some of the submitted data is invalid.
A server error occurred. Please try again later.
Some of the submitted data is invalid. Please review the highlighted fields.
One or more request parameters are invalid.
A request parameter has an invalid value.
A required request parameter is missing.
The request body is missing or malformed.
The API version is no longer supported. Please refresh the page.
The requested item was not found.
A referenced item no longer exists. Please refresh and try again.
This record was changed by someone else. Reload and try again.
The settlement amount exceeds the available balance.
The reserved amount is insufficient for this operation.
A payment hold is required before this action can proceed.
This rental is overdue — return it before adding more equipment.
The rental could not be prepared for signing — please review the details and try again.
Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
This email address is already in use.
The password does not meet the required policy (8–20 characters, at least one letter and one digit).
Another template was activated concurrently. The list has been refreshed — please retry.
The PDF could not be generated. Please try again.
There is no active agreement version. Ask an administrator to activate one.
This rental has already been signed and is now active.
The rental data changed since this screen was loaded. It has been reloaded — please review and try again.
The signature image is invalid. Please sign again.
The value does not match the required format.
Must be a date in the past.
Must be a date in the future.
Equipment is out of service and cannot be rented.
The selected equipment is out of service.
The account balance is insufficient for this operation.
The customer has insufficient funds. Available: , required: .
The customer has insufficient funds for this rental.
The selected equipment is already rented out.
This rental is no longer active (current status: ).
This rental is no longer active.
This template can no longer be edited (current status: ).
This template can no longer be edited.
This template cannot be activated (current status: ).
This template cannot be deleted (current status: ).
The agreement text changed since this screen was loaded (was version , now ). Please review the updated text and try again.
The agreement text changed since this screen was loaded. Please review the updated text and try again.
This rental is no longer awaiting signature (current status: ).
This rental is no longer awaiting signature.
The value is too short or too long.
Must have at most digits and decimal places.
The value has too many digits.
Price decreases over time after the first hour, with configurable minimums.
Flat hourly rate charged for each started hour.
Daily rate with additional overtime hourly charge for extra time.
One-time flat fee for issuance with optional minimum duration surcharge.
Special pricing rules; parameters not required or are configured elsewhere.
User management will be available after the authorization API is implemented.
No transactions for this rental yet
No rentals match the selected dates
Failed to load rental draft. Starting fresh.
Top up failed. Please try again.
Camera access was denied. Allow it in your browser settings or enter the UID manually.
No camera found. Enter the UID manually.
Could not start the scanner. Enter the UID manually.
Equipment not available or not found
No active or draft rental holds this equipment
Add at least one item to proceed
Balance will be charged automatically once topped up
Are you sure you want to cancel this rental?
Failed to return equipment. Please try again.
Failed to cancel rental. Please try again.
New items are billed only for the remaining time — the rental's return time does not change.
Select items to mark as broken and enter the penalty amount if applicable
Penalty submission is under development. Broken item tracking will be available in a future update.
A new version of the app is ready. Reload to continue with the latest version.
Could not apply the update. Please reload the page.
The app could not load part of itself and needs to be reloaded to keep working.
Your password must be updated before you can continue.
You do not have permission to view this page.
This is a protected system account and cannot be modified here
Leave blank to auto-generate a temporary password
This will disable the account and revoke all of its active sessions. The user will no longer be able to sign in until reactivated.
This will issue a new temporary password, force the user to change it at next login, and revoke all of their active sessions.
This password is shown only once and cannot be retrieved again. Copy it now and share it securely with the user.
Copy failed — select and copy the password manually
Activating this template will immediately deactivate the currently active version. Deactivated templates can never be edited or re-activated.
This draft template will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
Click a variable to insert it into the content at the cursor.
The rental starts at the moment of signing
I confirm that I have read and fully accept the terms of

By signing below, I confirm that I have reviewed the safety rules for using the rented equipment described in the Agreement, agree to comply with them, and confirm that my signature constitutes my informed and voluntary acceptance of the Agreement.
Only uppercase letters, numbers, hyphens and underscores
Value must be greater than zero
Value must be zero or greater
Birth date must be in the past
Must contain at least one letter and one digit
At least one role is required
